titular: Nintendo Switch 2 Delays Release of 007 First Light to Late Winter
cuerpo:
Owners of Nintendo Switch 2 will have to wait a little longer to play 007 First Light. The James Bond version, originally scheduled for release in Australia, has been pushed back until the end of this winter.

IO Interactive’s spy action title is still slated for a launch on May 27th on PS5, Xbox Series X/S and PC, marking its second delay since...
